name: Module handover protocol — factory exit → site arrival → crane lift → assembly → commissioning
standard: ICC/MBI 1205-2021 (US, Inspection of off-site construction) / Buildoffsite DfMA Handover Guide (UK) / CSA A277 (Canada)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that enforce a complete handover dossier covering every stage of a modular project: factory exit (as-built drawings, QC certificates, dimensional survey, weather-tight test), in-transit (escort log, damage inspection on arrival), site arrival (offload inspection, set-down survey, protection in place), crane lift (lift plan, rigging cert, lift supervisor sign-off, exclusion zone), inter-module assembly (alignment within ±10 mm at building face, connections torqued/welded/bolted per spec, fire-stopping installed), commissioning (MEP services connected, pressure-test, energise, witness test), snag list closure with categorised defects (A = safety/structural — block PC, B = function — fix before handover, C = cosmetic — punch list), and client acceptance with warranty registration.
